author: Mamarakhimov Fakhriddin Olimovich
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: his article analyzes the economic content of the concept of quality management, its role in the activities of modern enterprises and the main scientific approaches. The stages of the formation of quality management, the concepts of famous scientists and their practical application are covered. Conclusions are given on the economic efficiency of the implementation of quality management.
